changeReason: Improved translation from Japanese. Old: "Swordsmanship 101: Beginner's Course"

TextENGNew: ``Huh? Swords... manship?``
``Yes.@k@vS20/47/VTT_ouka3001a. Please teach me your skills, God.``
I was curious what she was so eager to ask me about... but swordsmanship, of all things?
Even I couldn't answer right away, instead trying to figure out Ouka's game.
...Just the other day, I practiced my sword skills on the shrine grounds so I wouldn't get rusty in this peaceful time where there hadn't been any recent Grifys activity.
Ouka happened to be cleaning the shrine and saw me, so I performed a little sword dance to entertain her.
But... I wasn't expecting her to tell me she wanted to learn it.
I regretted my carelessness in stoking a child's pure curiosity.
``...Ouka, do you understand what you are saying?@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3105. You are the miko of Furude Shrine, even if you are a child.``
``Mikos are supposed to abhor impure actions such as killing.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3107. So why would you want to learn the skills of a tool used to kill humans?``
``Please.@k@vS20/47/VTT_ouka3003. I want to learn swordsmanship too, so no burglars break into the shrine.``
``...Burglars?``

``...Lately, there have been more people moving into this village.@k@vS20/47/VTT_ouka3005. It's wrong to doubt others, but I want to learn the skills to protect myself in the worst-case scenario.@k@vS20/47/VTT_ouka3006. ...Am I asking too much?``
``N-no... you aren't. But I plan to keep you safe even now.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3110. Doesn't that make it unnecessary?``
``But... you leave this village from time to time.@k@vS20/47/VTT_ouka3008. You have important work too, so I don't think it's good rely on you forever.``
I immediately smiled at her kind consideration... but on the other hand, those feelings were all the reason I didn't think I should teach her.
So, I...
Resolved to give her a little stern instruction, took the sword from my waist... and handed it to Ouka.
``Ouka.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3113. ...Draw that sword and attack me.``
``Go on, Ouka.``
A bewildered expression rose to Ouka's face as she looked back and forth between the sword and me.
Still, I remained still and silent right where I was standing... so she reluctantly drew the sword from its sheath and pointed it toward me with faltering footing.
``...Now, come at me.``
``Y-yaaaaaaaaaaah!!``
I easily swatted Ouka's hand away when she thrust at me with all the youthful courage she could muster.
She fell on her butt on the spot from the excess momentum, the sword falling and rolling on the ground behind her.

``Remember this, and remember it well, Ouka.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3118. Swordsmanship is not for protecting yourself, but killing your opponent.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3119. And in the middle of training, you can hurt your opponent, those around you... or even yourself, or worst-case scenario get someone killed.``
``...So you must always possess the resolve to injure your opponents.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3121. You can't go into it half-hearted.``
Ouka's adorable eyes dampened as she looked at the ground.
Seeing her on the verge of tears broke my heart... but it was for her own good that I drilled in a harsh lesson like this right now.
With that thought in mind, I tried to walk over to make sure Ouka wasn't hurt, when...
``O-one more time!``
``Please let me try one more time!@k@vS20/47/VTT_ouka3019. Please, Hanyuu!``
``...@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3124. Very well.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3125. Now come at...@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3126. ?!``
``Taaaaaaah!!``
Ouka picked the sword off the ground, then raised it high overhead with no hesitation and charged with a determined expression.
I gasped and froze at this unexpected turn of events for a moment... but it was only that - a moment.
I swung my arm in the same way and knocked the sword out of Ouka's grasp.
...However, I must have miscalculated my strength, as the blow sent her flying and rolling on the ground harder than before.
``?@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3128. I-I'm so sorry, Ouka!@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3129. Are you all right?!``
``...I-I'm okay...@k@vS20/47/VTT_ouka3023. Nipah~.``
She wiped her dirty cheeks with her palm, as she quickly got back up and smiled.
...Those eyes were full of a stronger and livelier shine than before.
``Hanyuu, again... one more time!@k@vS20/47/VTT_ouka3025. I'll do better this time...!``

``...@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3132. So be it.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3133. If you are that determined... then I shall comply.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3134. However, do not expect me to show any mercy because you are a girl or child.``
``Huh...?@k@vS20/47/VTT_ouka3027. Th-then...!``
``Also, I will not allow you to give up or complain now that you have shown such insistence.@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3136. Keep that in mind... Are we clear?``
``Y-yes!``
Ouka smiled from ear to ear, as she bowed her head low enough to reach the ground.
I shrugged as I saw that, then told her I'd go get a wooden sword, and left.
``...I don't believe it.``
Ouka's second blow was supposed to have been slow.
But when I reached my arm out to knock it away... she saw that and changed the trajectory of her swing, even though she could barely hold the sword right.
What's more... she brought her left foot out ahead of her already extended right foot and used all her weight to change the direction of her body... That wasn't a standard sword strike.
``...Was it a fluke?@k@vS20/45/VTT_hanyu3139. Or... could it be...?!``
